name: Zoho Survey API
what_it_does: Online survey platform with REST API — enabling teams to create and manage surveys, collect responses, analyze results, and integrate with the Zoho ecosystem (Zoho CRM, Zoho Analytics, Zoho Campaigns), with OAuth2 authentication and webhooks for response notifications.
use_cases: Creating and distributing surveys via Zoho Survey API for customer feedback collection
Fetching survey responses via Zoho Survey API for automated data processing pipelines
Integrating survey data via Zoho Survey API with Zoho CRM for lead enrichment
Managing survey panels via Zoho Survey API for research audience management
Triggering surveys via Zoho Survey API based on CRM events for NPS automation
not_for: Enterprise academic research requiring advanced branching (use Qualtrics for research-grade surveys)
Teams not in Zoho ecosystem (integration value is Zoho-native)
Anonymous public surveys requiring no authentication from respondents
best_when: A team already using Zoho CRM, Zoho Analytics, or other Zoho products needs survey capabilities tightly integrated with their existing Zoho workflow.
avoid_when: You're not in the Zoho ecosystem, need advanced survey logic, or require enterprise research capabilities.

auth.notes: OAuth2 via Zoho Accounts (accounts.zoho.com). Authorization: Zoho-oauthtoken {access_token} header — non-standard 'Zoho-oauthtoken' prefix (not 'Bearer'). Scopes: ZohoSurvey.surveys.READ, ZohoSurvey.surveys.CREATE, ZohoSurvey.responses.READ. Regional endpoints: .com (US), .eu (EU), .in (India), .au (Australia), .jp (Japan). Token expiry: 1 hour (refresh token for long-running access). Server-to-server: client_credentials grant. REST API at surveycreator.zoho.com/api/v1/.

pricing.notes: Indian company (Chennai). Zoho Corporation — privately held, bootstrapped, founded 1996 by Sridhar Vembu. No VC funding (rare for SaaS at scale). Zoho Survey integrates with: Zoho CRM, Zoho Analytics, Zoho Campaigns, Zoho Flow, Zoho SalesIQ. Regional endpoints required for EU/GDPR data residency. API access from Basic plan and above. 30+ question types. Advanced logic: skip logic, branching, quotas. Panel management: Zoho survey panel for paid respondents. White-label surveys. GDPR compliant. 300M+ Zoho users globally.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; Zoho typically 200-1000 req/min depending on plan

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Non-standard 'Zoho-oauthtoken' header (not 'Bearer'). Regional endpoints required (.com/.eu/.in/.au/.jp). Basic plan required for API. Indian company (GDPR). Zoho ecosystem integration. 1-hour token expiry.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: GET requests idempotent. Survey creation: not idempotent (creates duplicate surveys). Response reads idempotent by response ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Regional endpoints: must use correct domain (.zoho.com/.zoho.eu/.zoho.in) matching account registration
API access requires Basic plan or above — free tier has no API access
OAuth2 token expiry: 1 hour — implement refresh token rotation for long-running agents
Zoho ecosystem dependency: deepest value when integrated with Zoho CRM/Analytics
EU data residency: use accounts.zoho.eu and surveycreator.zoho.eu for GDPR compliance

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 with granular scopes (read/create separate). Non-standard Zoho-oauthtoken header — sanitize logs. SOC2/ISO27001/GDPR certified. Survey response data is sensitive (PII potential). Regional endpoints for data residency compliance. Indian company: GDPR compliance via EU endpoints. Bootstrapped: no VC pressure — stable privacy approach historically.
